complaintValidated.title: Complaint Validated
complaintValidated.message: Your complaint '{{complaintTitle}}' has been validated and is now visible publicly.

complaintAssigned.title: Complaint Assigned
complaintAssigned.message: Your complaint '{{complaintTitle}}' has been assigned to {{department}}.

workStarted.title: Work Started
workStarted.message: Work has started on your complaint '{{complaintTitle}}'.

complaintResolved.title: Complaint Resolved
complaintResolved.message: Your complaint '{{complaintTitle}}' has been resolved! Please confirm if the issue is fixed.

complaintClosed.title: Complaint Closed
complaintClosed.message: Your complaint '{{complaintTitle}}' has been officially closed.

resolutionSubmitted.title: Resolution Reported
resolutionSubmitted.message: Technician has marked your complaint as resolved: "{{notes}}"

resolutionSubmittedNoNotes.title: Resolution Reported
resolutionSubmittedNoNotes.message: Technician has marked your complaint as resolved.

duplicateDetected.title: Possible Duplicate Detected
duplicateDetected.message: Your complaint "{{complaintTitle}}" may be a duplicate of "{{duplicateTitle}}". We'll review it.

taskAssigned.title: New Task Assigned
taskAssigned.message: You have been assigned to complaint: {{complaintTitle}}

teamAssigned.title: Team Assignment
teamAssigned.message: Your team has been assigned to complaint: {{complaintTitle}}

priorityUpdated.title: Priority Updated
priorityUpdated.message: Priority for complaint '{{complaintTitle}}' has been updated to {{priority}}

statusUpdated.title: Status Updated
statusUpdated.message: Complaint '{{complaintTitle}}' status has been updated to {{status}}

notifications.mergedAsDuplicate: Your complaint {{mergedRc}} was identified as similar to complaint {{originalRc}}: '{{originalTitle}}'. Your votes have been transferred. Tap to view the original report.
